# Repair Reinvoice

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:238223033f7a874baf8098e346b5048d92f469a49987fca13c7f907521bacab7
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

The purpose of this module is to allow reinvoice a Repair Order whose invoice has been Reversed.

:::{IMPORTANT}
This is an alpha version, the data model and design can change at any time without warning.
Only for development or testing purpose, do not use in production.
[More details on development status](https://odoo-community.org/page/development-status)
:::

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

Follow the Odoo standard repair module flow. When an invoice related to a RO is reversed,
the button to Create an Invoice will reappear.

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/OCA/repair/issues).
In case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been reported.
If you spotted it first, help us to smash it by providing a detailed and welcomed
[feedback](https://github.com/OCA/repair/issues/new?body=module:%20repair_reinvoice%0Aversion:%2016.0%0A%0A**Steps%20to%20reproduce**%0A-%20...%0A%0A**Current%20behavior**%0A%0A**Expected%20behavior**).

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with technical issues.

functions.name: odoo.addons.repair_reinvoice.hooks.fill_invoice_ids
documentation:
Fill new field invoice_ids with invoice_id and with credit notes
from reversed invoices
